91.reason: [When n is 0, a[0] is undefined and accessing it leads to undefined behavior. Also, if n == 0, the program should output nothing, but it will attempt to initialize the tree with an uninitialized value.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [When n is 0, a[0] is undefined and accessing it leads to undefined behavior. Also, if n == 0, the program should output nothing, but it will attempt to initialize the tree with an uninitialized value.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [If n is 0, accessing a[0] is invalid and init is called with uninitialized data; also, tree.root remains uninitialized when n == 0, leading to undefined behavior in insert or inorder]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [If n is 0, accessing a[0] is invalid and init is called with uninitialized data; also, tree.root remains uninitialized when n == 0, leading to undefined behavior in insert or inorder]

96.reason: [If n == 0, tree.root is uninitialized (since init is never called), leading to undefined behavior when passed to inorder.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If n == 0, tree.root is uninitialized (since init is never called), leading to undefined behavior when passed to inorder.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [If n == 0, tree.root is uninitialized (NULL), but inorder(NULL) is safe; however, the real issue is that when n == 0, nothing should be printed, but the original code would call init only if n>0. However, the critical error is that 'height' member is never initialized for the root node in init(), so root->height is garbage.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [If n == 0, tree.root is uninitialized (NULL), but inorder(NULL) is safe. However, the real issue is that when n == 0, nothing should be printed, but the original code would call init only if n>0. However, the critical error is that 'height' member is never initialized for the root node in init(), so root->height is garbage.]
